expectations.evidence: Queried zmluvy table for ICO 31322832, found contracts with/without uvo_url
Found 10 contracts with UVO links across UVO, Josephine, and EKS platforms
Found 26 contracts without UVO links, identified key ones above 5K EUR threshold
Uses different format — grouped by procurement type rather than per-contract CRZ data tables with zlte stopy. No structured zlte stopy tables per contract
Has detailed 'Hodnotenie' section noting all contracts above 100K have UVO links, 68 red flags identified
